name: 4 weddings
overview: Israeli reality TV show on Kan 11 where four brides attend each other’s weddings, rate the events, and compete for a luxury honeymoon prize. The format is based on the international “Four Weddings” series, adapted for Israeli audiences.

trailers.title: 4 כלות ושירה נאור אחת: התוכנית החדשה - והמנחה שלא ממהרת להתחתן
